title: Prehistorum
description: A mod that adds paleontology, prehistoric creatures and more to Neoforge 1.21.1
body: Prehistorum is a minecraft mod that add Prehistoric Life to Neoforge 1.21.1! In this mod you'll find fossils you can revive, new dimensions, new bosses, and much much more! With 55 new mobs, new armor, new tools, and updates on a regular basis to add even more features!
